穷学生苏尘，在万界开淘宝店，不断接到各界的订单，从此穿越诸天万界送货，得到一个个超级红包！
穿越《丧尸世界》，得到一把消音AWM，加载吃鸡外挂，杀得丧尸闻风丧胆，以八尺血躯，护我华夏山河！！
穿越《功夫》，购买老乞丐的如来神掌、九阳神功、乾坤大挪移，一跃成为绝世高手！
穿越《僵尸先生》，九叔林正英传授一身茅山道术，还带回来一头千年美艳僵尸，天天缠着要我陪她打王者！
等等！超级大国太嚣张，敢犯我华夏！
把一群饿疯了的进击的巨人空投过去，尽情地肆虐吧！
……
闲来QQ农场种种菜，抓一头骨鲲当宠物，大乔小乔相伴左右，我真的只是个普通人……顶多，有个系统。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/24da710bf3a200083db229a75b5f9f64","author":"妙妙酱丷","author_id":"","book_id":"6829266727675628551","book_name":"万界之最强穿越系统","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":383,"name":"九叔","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=383&name=九叔&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6829325508606427661","read_count":"18532","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"5758950"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"2781","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,诸天万界,多女主,九叔,同人,副本,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/
